race.comment: ENXUTO (7) comes to Sydney after the two eye catching runs in Melbourne and will relish the good tempo. No match for the classy Birdman when a gritty second over the mile in the G2 Blamey at Flemington. Unlucky not to finish closer in the Ingham last December and gets his chance here. LORD PENMAN (6) justified the heavy support on resumption with a decisive victory over 1400m at this track in the James Ruse. This should be the launching pad for bigger Autumn riches. Top-three contender. CRISTAL CLEAR (8) went quickly through the grades last time in and looks to have come back even stronger judging by the two good trials. Will go forward from the low draw and prove hard to run down. MILITARIZE (2) encouraging return when fourth in the G3 Liverpool City Cup over 1300m at Randwick. Would prefer a bit of cut out of the ground but will be suited with the strong tempo. Each way. GLOBE (1) Caulfield Stakes winner resuming with the two sharp trial wins. Don't dismiss.
